prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on molecular oxygen (O₂) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet ground state). Single-point calculation on the user-supplied geometry at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz; geometry was not re-optimized. SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy = true.

Results:
- HOMO energy: −8.8739616 eV (occupation 1.0)
- LUMO energy: −3.5859031 eV (occupation 0.0)
- HOMO–LUMO gap (headline value): 5.2880586 eV
- Total electronic energy: −150.38872 Hartree (−4092.2855 eV)

The degeneracy of HOMO/HOMO−1 (both −8.8740 eV) and LUMO/LUMO+1 (both −3.5859 eV) is physically expected from the degenerate πg* SOMOs of the O₂ triplet. All orbital energies are Koopmans-style estimates, not true IPs or excitation energies.
